case_title: ZHEN, DEREK SUI LEUNG vs. POWELL, FRANKLIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHEN, DEREK SUI LEUNG AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, FRANKLIN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-15-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-27-1998

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF APR-21-1998, OFF CALENDAR APR 21,1998 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-24-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED ON 7-15-98.
